channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [DBOL] Dhampur Bio Organics: Chairman Vijay Kumar Goel Passes Away
item.description:
Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd. announced the death of its Chairman and Executive Director, Shri Vijay Kumar Goel, on May 10, 2026. The company acknowledged his contributions and legacy in an exchange filing under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shri Vijay Kumar Goel, Chairman and Executive Director, passed away on May 10, 2026.
  • The company mourns the loss and recognizes his contributions.
  • DIN of deceased director is 00075317.
  • The announcement was made under Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dhampur Bio Organics Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PYRAMID] Pyramid Technoplast Board Meeting on May 13, 2026
item.description:
Pyramid Technoplast Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 13, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares will remain closed for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 13, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Audited results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours post result declaration.
  • Meeting will be held at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pyramid Technoplast Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IFGLEXPOR] IFGL Refractories: K Selva Muthu Kumar Resigns as VP
item.description:
Mr. K Selva Muthu Kumar has resigned from his position as Vice President (Vizag Works) of IFGL Refractories Ltd due to personal reasons, effective from the close of business hours on May 9, 2026. His resignation has been accepted by the company. In his place, Mr. C Natarajan has been appointed as the new Vice President (Vizag Works), effective from May 10, 2026. Mr. Natarajan holds a Bachelor’s degree in Ceramic Technology and has 28 years of experience in the Refractory industry.

  • K Selva Muthu Kumar resigned as Vice President (Vizag Works) due to personal reasons.
  • Resignation is effective from close of business hours on May 9, 2026.
  • C Natarajan appointed as Vice President (Vizag Works) effective May 10, 2026.
  • C Natarajan has 28 years of experience in the Refractory industry.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFGL Refractories Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NUKLEUS] Nukleus Office Solutions Board Meeting Scheduled for May 16, 2026
item.description:
Nukleus Office Solutions Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 16, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the half-yearly and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited standalone financial results.

  • Board meeting on May 16, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Financial results are for the half-year and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post results declaration.
  • Compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nukleus Office Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [IFGLEXPOR] IFGL Refractories: K Selva Muthu Kumar Resigns, C Natarajan Appointed
item.description:
IFGL Refractories Ltd announces the resignation of Mr. K Selva Muthu Kumar, Vice President (Vizag Works), effective May 9, 2026, due to personal reasons. The company has accepted his resignation. In his place, Mr. C Natarajan has been appointed as the new Vice President (Vizag Works), effective May 10, 2026. Mr. Natarajan holds a Bachelor’s degree in Ceramic Technology and has 28 years of experience in the refractory industry.

  • K Selva Muthu Kumar resigned as Vice President (Vizag Works) effective May 9, 2026.
  • Resignation was due to personal reasons and accepted by IFGL Refractories.
  • C Natarajan appointed as Vice President (Vizag Works) effective May 10, 2026.
  • Natarajan has 28 years of experience in the refractory industry.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFGL Refractories Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NUKLEUS] Nukleus Office Solutions: Trading Window Closure
item.description:
Nukleus Office Solutions Ltd. announced the closure of its trading window from March 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the half-year and year ended March 31, 2026. The board meeting to consider the results is scheduled for May 16, 2026. Designated persons are advised not to trade in the company's securities during this period, as per SEBI regulations.

  • Trading window closed from March 1, 2026.
  • Closure extends until 48 hours post Audited Financial Results announcement.
  • Board meeting for results is on May 16, 2026.
  • Designated persons restricted from trading during closure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nukleus Office Solutions Ltd | Category: Insider Trading

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital: FY26 Financial Results Approved
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial statements (standalone and consolidated) for Q4 and the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board meeting, held on May 10, 2026, commenced at 10:15 A.M. and concluded at 11:50 A.M. The results were recommended by the Audit Committee and include year-to-date figures from April 1, 2025, to March 31, 2026.

  • Audited financial statements (standalone and consolidated) for FY26 approved.
  • Financial results for Q4 ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Year-to-date results from April 1, 2025, to March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Board meeting held on May 10, 2026.
  • Audit Committee recommended the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital Approves FY26 Results, 10% Dividend
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd's board approved audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for Q4 and FY26. They recommended a final dividend of 10% (Re. 0.10 per share). The board also approved raising funds through Non-Convertible Debt Securities and changes in senior managerial roles, including Mr. Gaurav Chaubey as Chief Business Officer and Mr. BVSKT Bhaskar as Chief Risk Officer. The meeting concluded at 11:50 A.M.

  • Approved audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for FY26.
  • Recommended a final dividend of 10% (Re. 0.10 per share) for FY26.
  • Approved raising funds through Non-Convertible Debt Securities.
  • Gaurav Chaubey appointed as Chief Business Officer (CBO).
  • BVSKT Bhaskar appointed as Chief Risk Officer (CRO).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital Recommends ₹0.10 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd's board recommended a final dividend of ₹0.10 per share (10%) for FY 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY26. Additionally, they approved raising funds through Non-Convertible Debt Securities and changes in senior management roles, with Mr. Gaurav Chaubey becoming Chief Business Officer and Mr. BVSKT Bhaskar becoming Chief Risk Officer.

  • Paisalo Digital recommends a final dividend of ₹0.10 per share (10%) for FY26.
  • Board approved audited financial statements (standalone and consolidated) for FY26.
  • Fund raising approved via Non-Convertible Debt Securities.
  • Gaurav Chaubey appointed as Chief Business Officer (CBO).
  • BVSKT Bhaskar appointed as Chief Risk Officer (CRO).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [PAISALO] Paisalo Digital: Gaurav Chaubey Appointed CBO, BVSKT Bhaskar CRO
item.description:
Paisalo Digital Ltd's board approved the audited financial statements for FY26 and recommended a final dividend of ₹0.10 per share. Additionally, the board approved raising funds through Non-Convertible Debt Securities and a change in the role and designation of Senior Managerial Personnel. Mr. Gaurav Chaubey is now Chief Business Officer (CBO), and Mr. BVSKT Bhaskar is the new Chief Risk Officer (CRO).

  • Paisalo Digital approved audited financial statements for FY26.
  • A final dividend of ₹0.10 per share was recommended for FY26.
  • The company approved raising funds via Non-Convertible Debt Securities.
  • Gaurav Chaubey appointed as Chief Business Officer (CBO).
  • BVSKT Bhaskar appointed as Chief Risk Officer (CRO).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Paisalo Digital Ltd | Category: Management Change
